title: Gate 27: Nourishment
description: You feel called to care for, nourish, and be responsible for others' wellbeing. This caring energy is beautiful and powerful — AND you must protect yourself from those who take without reciprocating.
learningGoal: The viewer understands what Gate 27 (Nourishment — Nourishing responsibility through embodied care) means in their daily life, in plain terms.
keyPoints: You feel called to care for, nourish, and be responsible for others' wellbeing.
This caring energy is beautiful and powerful
AND you must protect yourself from those who take without reciprocating.
forbiddenClaims: a gate guarantees a talent you do not have to develop
gates rank people as better or worse
an activated gate forces a fixed behaviour

variants.angleNote: THE GIFT — what this gives you. Recognition, the quiet power of it. Make them feel seen.
variants.hook: Gate 27: Nourishment — the part most people miss.
variants.participationPrompt: Does this land? Drop a ✦ if this is you.

variants.angleNote: THE SHADOW — the not-self trap, the misalignment signal to watch for. Honest, never fearful.
variants.hook: Gate 27: Nourishment — the trap nobody warns you about.
variants.participationPrompt: Caught yourself here before? Tell me where.

variants.angleNote: THE PRACTICE — one concrete move for today. Action-oriented, motion-forward, doable now.
variants.participationPrompt: Try it today. Come back and tell me what shifted.

variants.angleNote: THE MIRROR — how this shows up with other people. The relational lens.
variants.hook: Gate 27: Nourishment — why it changes every room you enter.
variants.participationPrompt: Who in your life does this explain? Tag the feeling.

toneNotes: Oracle/sage register: warm, recognition-based, unhurried, mythic but grounded. Speak directly to the viewer. No jargon, no hype, no fear.

output_metadata.title: Gate 27: Nourishment — Your Energy Blueprint
output_metadata.description: You feel called to care for, nourish, and be responsible for others' wellbeing. This caring energy is beautiful and powerful — AND you must protect yourself from those who take without reciprocating.
